overall.description: A ship simulation game depicting the view from a vessel's bridge as it navigates through rough open waters. The scene features functional navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with weather transitioning from heavy rain to overcast conditions while the ship maintains steady forward momentum.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during heavy weather

events.description: heavy rain subsides and visibility improves as storm passes

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and maintaining course through rough seas from the bridge

entered.detail: circular radar display with rotating sweep showing nearby contacts
digital navigation map showing vessel position and chart data
display showing water depth and sonar readings
metal and glass structure of the ship's bridge viewing port
red-painted bow deck of the vessel with safety railings
choppy dark gray sea with visible wave action
heavy rain streaks and water droplets on the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: From the enclosed bridge of a vessel, the camera looks out over the bow into a stormy seascape. Heavy rain streaks across the windows while the radar display rotates above, showing the ship navigating through rough waters with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water navigation from ship bridge

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady course through moderate seas with clear navigation monitoring

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues sailing through open waters as weather conditions improve to overcast skies. The bridge displays remain active with the radar continuously sweeping, while the ship maintains steady forward motion through the gray seascape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous view from a vessel's bridge as a stormy, low-visibility seascape gradually transitions into a calmer, overcast environment. It begins looking out over the bow through windows streaked with heavy rain, while a rotating radar display above tracks the ship's progress through rough waters. As the vessel maintains its steady forward momentum, the torrential rain begins to subside and the oppressive storm clears. The scene then shifts to a steady cruise through open waters under a gray, overcast sky, with the active bridge displays continuing to sweep the horizon.
